message:
fix(ft-api): tensor_combinations autograd via gather-scatter backward [bd-d214]

tensor_combinations used to extract values, build the combinatorial
output in plain f64, and rebuild a requires_grad=false leaf —
silently severing autograd. PyTorch's torch.combinations IS
differentiable.

Reuse the gather-scatter pattern from cartesian_prod / unfold:
pre-compute the (output_pos → input_pos) mapping during the
recursive combo enumeration (using indices instead of values), then
wrap in tensor_apply_function with the mapping captured by both
forward (gather) and backward (scatter) closures.

Adds combinations_propagates_gradient_via_scatter regression test:
  input = [10, 20, 30], r=2 (no replacement)
  → output = [[10, 20], [10, 30], [20, 30]]   (3 combos)
  Each input element appears in C(n-1, r-1) = 2 rows.
  Under sum loss: grad = [2, 2, 2].

Closes frankentorch-d214. ft-api lib tests: 1168 passing (+1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
